results.command: OUT=artifacts/optimization/frankenredis-ohsk5.5 SERVER=target-orangemouse-ohsk5-5-peer-baseline/release-perf/frankenredis BENCH=target-orangemouse-ohsk5-5-peer-baseline/release-perf/fr-bench PORT=49350 WORKLOAD=hset LABEL=paired-currenttree-baseline PREFIX=om-ohsk5-5-pair-base bash -c 'log="$OUT/$LABEL-server-$PORT-$$.log"; "$SERVER" --bind 127.0.0.1 --port "$PORT" --mode strict >"$log" 2>&1 & pid=$!; cleanup(){ kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; }; trap cleanup EXIT; for _ in $(seq 1 100); do grep -q ready "$log" && break; kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null || exit 1; sleep 0.05; done; grep -q ready "$log" || exit 1; "$BENCH" --host 127.0.0.1 --port "$PORT" --clients 50 --requests 300000 --pipeline 16 --workload "$WORKLOAD" --keyspace 10000 --datasize 3 --json-out "$OUT/$LABEL-$WORKLOAD-p16-300k-last.json" --key-prefix "$PREFIX" >/dev/null; cleanup; trap - EXIT'

OUT=artifacts/optimization/frankenredis-ohsk5.5 SERVER=target-orangemouse-ohsk5-5-candidate/release-perf/frankenredis BENCH=target-orangemouse-ohsk5-5-candidate/release-perf/fr-bench PORT=49351 WORKLOAD=hset LABEL=paired-currenttree-candidate PREFIX=om-ohsk5-5-pair-cand bash -c 'log="$OUT/$LABEL-server-$PORT-$$.log"; "$SERVER" --bind 127.0.0.1 --port "$PORT" --mode strict >"$log" 2>&1 & pid=$!; cleanup(){ kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; }; trap cleanup EXIT; for _ in $(seq 1 100); do grep -q ready "$log" && break; kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null || exit 1; sleep 0.05; done; grep -q ready "$log" || exit 1; "$BENCH" --host 127.0.0.1 --port "$PORT" --clients 50 --requests 300000 --pipeline 16 --workload "$WORKLOAD" --keyspace 10000 --datasize 3 --json-out "$OUT/$LABEL-$WORKLOAD-p16-300k-last.json" --key-prefix "$PREFIX" >/dev/null; cleanup; trap - EXIT'
